Ship's rigging and sails A detailed view of a tall ship's masts, rigging, and sails with a flag flying from the top mast against a pale sky.
Official document from the French Republic A formal decree or appointment issued by the President of the Republic to Ferrand Léry, bearing the seal of the Order of the Legion of Honor.
Helicopter landing A white and blue helicopter hovers low over a grassy field as a person in a brown shirt stands on the ground observing it.
Victorian-style house facade A close-up view of a house with purple and gray siding, decorative trim, and multiple windows under a brown shingled roof.

Railway station and train car A black-and-white image shows a wooden railway station building with a sign reading "SALMON" and a passenger train car parked beside it, set against a backdrop of rugged mountains.
Railway tracks at a station Multiple parallel railway tracks extend into the distance under a clear sky, with a yellow maintenance vehicle visible on the right side of the image.
Church building with flagpole A stone church with a clock tower and red flagpole under a clear blue sky, surrounded by green trees.
Man in formal attire A black-and-white portrait depicts a man in a dark coat and bow tie, seated at a desk with his hand resting on a document or writing surface.
Mount Horeb A prominent, rocky mountain peak rises above a forested landscape under a clear blue sky, with distant hills visible on the horizon.
Woman in a straw hat and light-colored dress A smiling woman wearing a straw hat and a light-colored dress is pictured outdoors, with other people partially visible in the background.
Urban residential buildings A cluster of multi-story apartment buildings with varied facades, including orange and beige panels, surrounded by greenery and street signage under a clear sky.
Person A black-and-white image shows the lower torso and leg of a person wearing loose-fitting pants and a belt, with one hand resting near the thigh.
Map of Uruguay A map of Uruguay displaying regional data for the "Unión Cívica Intransigente" party, with color-coded areas indicating percentages greater than 30%, 40%, 50%, and 60%.
Basketball player A player in a white jersey with the number 23 and matching shorts stands on a court, with a person wearing braided hair visible in the foreground.
Map of the Maldives A map showing the Maldives archipelago as a cluster of green dots in the Indian Ocean, with a larger landmass to the northeast and a small inset map in the upper left corner.

Wheelchair basketball team A group of seven athletes, including three in wheelchairs and four standing, pose with medals and team jerseys at a sports event, with sponsor logos visible on the backdrop.
Crowded street scene A large group of people, including adults and children, are walking together on a paved street in a black-and-white photograph.
Fish A close-up of a black-and-white striped fish with spotted fins, likely a species of cichlid, swimming in water.
Piano keyboard segment A close-up view of a piano keyboard showing black keys labeled "M2" and "N" with white keys labeled "B" and "D2" beneath them.

Map of the Dalmatian Coast An aged, sepia-toned cartographic depiction of the Dalmatian coast, featuring labeled locations such as "Plemene" and "Sutri," with a scale bar indicating distances in miles.
Grave marker in a cemetery A weathered stone monument with carved details stands in a grassy cemetery surrounded by trees and other headstones.
Castle emblem A stylized white castle with a black arched doorway and two windows, set against a background of blue, green, and yellow sections with yellow clover-like shapes.

School building entrance A modern school building with a prominent black vertical sign displaying the word "SCHOOL" and a crest above it, set against a stone facade with glass windows and a red traffic cone nearby.
Flag of the Republic of Turkey The flag features a yellow crescent moon and a five-pointed star on a blue background.

Industrial complex with brick and metal structures A cluster of industrial buildings featuring a prominent brick structure, a tall metal tower with a lattice framework, and a white utility pole in the foreground under an overcast sky.

Circular building with a domed roof A white-painted circular building with a red and white patterned domed roof, featuring a window with bars and an open doorway, set against a backdrop of trees and a brick structure.
L'Occitane Shea Butter An open metal tin of L'Occitane Shea Butter with a dollop of the creamy product on top, alongside its labeled lid featuring the brand name and product type.
Crowded gathering A dense crowd of people, mostly seen from behind, is gathered in an outdoor setting, with many individuals wearing dark clothing and some in hooded jackets.
White statue of a standing figure A tall, white statue of a standing figure is positioned on a platform beside a traditional East Asian-style roof, with green mountains visible in the background.
Marble sculpture of a reclining figure A white marble sculpture depicts a nude female figure lying on her side with one arm raised, positioned within a dark stone niche.
Sputnik monument A tall reddish-brown stone monument with engraved text, including the word "SPUTNIK" at the top, stands in an open field with sparse vegetation and a tree to the right.
Bar chart A blue bar chart with five vertical bars of increasing height from left to right, displayed against a white background.

Modern architectural building with glass and metal facade A contemporary building featuring a large glass roof and metal framework, with visible signage and urban surroundings including a crosswalk and streetlights.
Stadion am Sportpark Aerial view of a modern stadium with a green football pitch, surrounded by trees and adjacent buildings, set within a large sports complex.
Cherry blossom tree A dense canopy of pink cherry blossoms fills the frame, with dark branches visible against a bright blue sky.
Man in formal attire A man with a goatee and mustache, wearing a dark suit, white collared shirt, and a red patterned tie, is shown in a close-up shot.
Person with cane A person in a dark coat and hat stands outdoors, holding a cane, with a picket fence and grassy ground visible in the background.
Man in traditional attire A man wearing a white turban and light-colored suit sits with hands clasped, surrounded by other individuals in a formal group setting.
Map fragment A partial map showing a light-colored geographical area with internal boundaries against a black background.

Art gallery interior A dimly lit gallery space features a large, illuminated painting on the wall, with dark wooden benches positioned in front, and additional framed artworks visible in the background.
Highway scene with trees and vehicles A multi-lane highway stretches into the distance, flanked by tall green trees on both sides, with several cars visible on the road under a clear sky.
Building entrance with concrete pillars and glass facade A modern building entrance featuring concrete pillars, a glass-paneled upper level, and a person walking through the covered walkway beneath.
Two men posing together Two men are standing side by side, one wearing a red turtleneck and glasses, the other in a light-colored shirt with a lanyard and ID badge, in an indoor setting.
Church of Christ A single-story building with a green roof and brick facade, flanked by tall evergreen trees and a sign reading "CHURCH OF CHRIST" in front.
Woman A black-and-white close-up shows a woman with long hair smiling, with her face partially visible and a patterned garment in the background.
Man in sunglasses and suit A man wearing dark sunglasses, a dark suit, a white collared shirt, and a dark tie is shown in a close-up, black-and-white photograph.
Building facade A brick building with arched windows and a central entrance, partially obscured by a blurred overlay.
Airport terminal building A modern airport terminal building with a large sign displaying "AIRPORT" and a logo above the entrance, under a clear blue sky.
Two-story house with porch A white-painted house with a dark roof and front porch, flanked by palm trees and a bare tree, with a wreath hanging on the door.
Figure in dark robe A person wearing a dark, draped robe with a brown belt tied around the waist, partially covered by a lighter brown outer garment.
